heading: Definitions
label: 3908 Definitions
text: For purposes of applying this chapter, the terms “employing office” and “covered employee” have the meanings given those terms in .section 401 of title 3
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 1, 1997section 3(d) of Pub. L. 104–331section 1296 of this title
